_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: the ALP activity of the 2−7 and 2−12 groups treated with icariin was higher than those of the control group without icariin, especially at the later stage of the induction process
details: Icariin treatment at 10^-5 M concentration promoted osteogenic differentiation in NF1 knockout C2C12 cells, with increased ALP activity and osteogenic marker gene expression, especially at later stages (days 5-7)
